plugin_desc: Aethra Telecommunications IAD/DSL 接入路由器（含 VoIP）专用 SNMP 采集模板（AETHRA-MIB，企业号 7745）。除标准 IF-MIB 接口指标外，额外采集 Aethra 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 5 分钟平均负载（cpuLoad5min，直接 %）与主内存（总内存 + 空闲内存，KBytes，使用率按 (总量-空闲)/总量 推导）。温度/风扇/电源本模板未采集，故为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Aethra Telecommunications IAD/DSL 路由器（AC2036/Dolcevita 系列，企业号 7745）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: Average CPU load of the Aethra router over the last 5 minutes (enterprise 7745 cpuLoad5min, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total main memory of the Aethra router in bytes (enterprise 7745). The raw OID is reported in kBytes and is scaled by 1024 to bytes.

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free main memory of the Aethra router in bytes (enterprise 7745). The raw OID is reported in kBytes and is scaled by 1024 to bytes.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Aethra router, derived as (total-free)/total (enterprise 7745).

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
